A little hesitant, to be honest, as the prices are on the steeper end. I ordered a chocolate cookie with sea salt, blueberry crumble cake, marble cake slice and a black forest cake. To begin with, the cookie was fantastic. It had the right amount of bite and goodness. I felt the salt was a bit too much to my liking. Nevertheless, it was outstanding. Coming over to the blueberry crumble cake, it came beautifully decorated. The cake was soft and moist but had a strange lemongrass fragrance and flavour, overpowering the entire cake. The marble slice was nice and moist. The caramel on top was delectable. The only off-putting dessert was the black forest cake. The cherries had gone bad and the taste of the cake was undecipherable. Overall, it was a nice experience.

Edit- Today, I had their Basque cheese cake, mango tea cake slice and chocolate and salted caramel cake. The tea cake was moist and flavorful. It came beautifully decorated with meringue kisses and mango pieces and had a very summery flavour. The chocolate ganache in the chocolate caramel cake seems a bit off today. Together, the ganache, caramel and sponge tasted fine because of the overpowering flavour of caramel. (Which was delicious). But, the ganache wasn't rich or silky. The last dessert is the basque cheesecake. I didn't enjoy it. It tasted eggy and bland.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNL-oOzexIbb9TG1RCWZ2isKEGNyVd1IkmElPdT&fid=0x0:0x562265cc20edfb1c"],"When":"2023-7-12"},{"Name":"Manish Gayan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX38_n9APJcXp7ez5yYRKP1Jep6j9rSJo_I4W7ZXP4aFQxmP3Xkcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been hearing a lot of buzz about this place and finally decided to give it a try. I ordered blueberry cheese cake. They sent me bread and cream  with worst taste. No one can even take a full bite. When called restaurant , they hung up the call.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP7lBpmGZ9c4UkMXgUteGKY46BkSvJvv2FIndVQ&fid=0x0:0x14d357b10d628a8"],"When":"2024-6-4"},{"Name":"Tanbir Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVfmWteRHWRPVDtZo2ey8xSXqGBxvxtjkh7rEywq1fniQmSdhS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"“Worst Customer Service and Money Loot...!!!”

I ordered a Valentine Cake “Cheif Special with flowers bouquet” as shown in the attached picture. Other cakes on the same page would cost you Rs.900-Rs.1000 with flowers. I ordered for their Valentine Special cake so called “Cake Chief Special”  for Rs.1300 with flowers. When I got the delivery it was only cake WITHOUT flowers Bouquets. When I called them they flatly denied me and said you ordered only for Cake.

Cake was also not up to the Mark. It's not same as shown in the picture. They are just misleading the customers and making fool on Valentine’s day.

Guys- Please don’t get into this bloody trap.

I even tried to reach them on Customer Service number 011-26134189 & 9971490178 and what’s app them on 9971495880 but No one picks the call and even they disconnect.

Instead of apologizing, they had the audacity to challenge you if you take any action against them.

I am going lodge a complaint against them in consumer court for misleading the customers online.

This is a criminal Action under cheating, fraudulent, breach of trust may be initiated, and depending upon the merit of the case under section 406, 420 of IPC and section of IT Act (Cyber Crime) may further apply.

I will seek legal advice and don’t let them make others fool.

They have spoiled my Valentine’s Day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPkA4EQ-2bFESxaN9V03S7Bd0jXaeaKiyi1dQFn&fid=0x0:0x14d357b10d628a8"],"When":"2018-2-14"},{"Name":"San Lamkang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhNHejSJ6-MwpTX5DRuOM_-giW3XEBr60vL4j_I_STy6m5xW71=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst experience ever… spoiled the whole birthday mood... I ordered 1kg butterscotch cake through swiggy from this bakery... They sent me a totaly different cake... I had asked them to write a happy birthday with a name and instead they sent me a ‘happy birthday mom’ cake.. Like seriously? The cake wasn't even 1kg to begin with... And it came in a lil damaged (which is understable as it may have happened during transit )… but the whole experience was truly frustrating!!!
I would never recommend anyone to buy from this shop nor do I wish such incidence to occur on anybody on their special day!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPC-nKt-oTWug9hsfW1DUQDLYe0ZFrVPpVQpLeE&fid=0x0:0x14d357b10d628a8"],"When":"2023-12-20"},{"Name":"babita chaudhary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVoIEygtkkNZbnrHRufBkcu15rE5MC8r9L_suC8eBcHrFe8A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cake is awesome nd delicious in looks nd taste.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO7zJ1x5N5hDRB86DUE3EB5lOIQDRBHzQljy0zf&fid=0x0:0x14d357b10d628a8"],"When":"2024-5-9"},{"Name":"Ajit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUS_9DshCvmKAYqkA0pKYzEQBRj7i4lyRCcgN71T6_61rrYpLfu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"One of worst bakery shop I say in NCR. I never ever recommend this shop to any one. I order a cake a cake online to deliver on very next day of ordering but there is no response from them at deliver time. I called almost 50 times on all the number available on their site but no one respond. No response on email. It's look like some fake bakery shop. After discussed with my office legal team they informed wait for 24 - 72 working hours and then register a FIR about fraud and in breach of service contract after made a successful payment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shubham Dubey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKeujIx_YmgIm_EbSotUWStbJB-8L2AemxPObrSMuBu-UJJQg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have ordered fudge cake from magicpin app where they have listed themselves. [{"Name":"Stuthi S.Shetty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7wGzcOd6NEDTJ8fFBZ1FOoCopVYVca6vYQAOMseeRRQWlR9I4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst cake ever. I recommend people with good taste and people who want to order cakes for loved ones, think well and long before placing the order.

Requested for a birthday cake with a Sagittarius bow and arrow cake and a No fondant cake as advertised by them.
The cake was covered in fondant despite asking for no fondant. Aparna who was in conversation with me regarding the cake, she said fondant will be used for the bow, so I agreed ... But she even made the fondant layer coating around the cake.

Requested for a chocolate strawberry cake .. strawberries barely visible, cake tasted bad. Very disappointed and sad.

The cake costed a total of 5000 rupees. Price was ok since it was customised, advance also paid without any discussion. The other half of the money she asked before delivery so we requested that we pay after seeing the cake safe and sound. She argued, she guaranteed safe delivery of the cake, gave examples of wedding cake deliveries done right around Delhi. We finally agreed to believe in her confidence and paid the money....

As you can see in the picture, the bow broke. Cake was not white as requested. No Gold dust despite requesting. The fondant was a weird cream color.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMPcRi3dW5LXpGBeYxxJXtPZ4SKiXXyY0m0-mgg&fid=0x0:0x79a953d4f321904f"],"When":"2024-12-18"},{"Name":"Mohini Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXjcj3IuMfRzmvHOupZimAjYyCaFAeo3i1-0c2KsU5LRmolE90=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the most wonderful experience with Aparna and TheBakers.in!
I ordered a custom cake for my best friend's bachelorette party and the entire experience was absolutely smooth.

Aparna was prompt with her responses on whatsapp, willing to customise the design of the cake according to my preference and ever- ready to offer advice/ suggestions on what would look and taste the best. She managed to produce a superb product on an extremely tight deadline and even hand delivered the cake to the venue!

Cherry on the cake—the actual cake was absolutely DELICIOUS! (I can still feel my tastebuds tingling). We had hit a roadblock with the particular flavour I had asked for on account of certain fresh ingredients not available in the market, but Aparna managed to deliver an alternative option that was fantastic!
